organization.name: Identity Documents Personalisation Centre under the Ministry of the Interior
organization.legalName: Asmens dokumentų išrašymo centras prie LR Vidaus reikalų ministerijos

evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: Identity Documents Personalisation Centre under the Ministry of the Interior is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Lithuania, providing digital trust services via nsc.vrm.lt.
